title: Installations
subtitle: Connect your website in minutes with the guided installation wizard.
name: Display name
empty: No installations yet. Start the wizard to connect your first website.
connectionSuccess: Connection established. Your system is ready to sync.
tokenHint: Use this token in your plugin or integration. It will not be shown again.
error: Could not create installation. Try again.

wizard.title: Installation wizard
wizard.subtitle: Connect your website in minutes. Complexity stays behind the scenes.
wizard.verifyHint: Add the meta tag below to your site header, then confirm verification.
wizard.confirmVerification: I have added the meta tag
wizard.modulesHint: Select the Aipify modules to enable for this installation.
wizard.credentialsHint: Copy this token into your plugin or integration. It is shown once.
wizard.activateHint: Confirm activation once your plugin is configured with the installation token.
wizard.completed: Installation complete. Your website is connected to Aipify.

modern.title: Connect Aipify
modern.subtitle: Install Aipify like a modern SaaS product — no license keys required.
modern.principle: Complexity belongs inside Aipify. Simplicity belongs to the customer.
modern.empty: Complete account setup to start connecting your platform.
modern.assistantPrompt: Where would you like to install Aipify?
modern.escalateHint: Briefly describe what went wrong. Do not include passwords or payment details.
modern.escalateSuccess: Support has been notified. We will follow up shortly.
modern.escalateError: Could not send escalation. Try again.
modern.detectionUncertain: We could not detect your platform automatically. Please choose one.
modern.licensePaused: Aipify services are paused. Update billing to continue installation.
modern.licenseGrace: Your subscription is in a grace period. Complete payment soon to avoid suspension.

shopify.title: Shopify installation
shopify.summary: Install the app, approve permissions, and activate.

installApp.title: Install app
installApp.body: Install Aipify from the Shopify App Store.

approve.title: Approve permissions
approve.body: Review and approve the requested scopes.

recommendations.title: Review recommendations
recommendations.body: Review skill recommendations for your store.

wordpress.title: WordPress installation
wordpress.summary: Install the plugin, sign in, and verify your domain.

signIn.title: Sign in to Aipify
signIn.body: Connect your Aipify account from the plugin.

woocommerce.title: WooCommerce installation
woocommerce.summary: Install the plugin and connect your Aipify account.

connect.title: Connect account
connect.body: Sign in with Aipify from your store admin.

custom.title: Custom website installation
custom.summary: Add the Aipify script and verify your domain.

addScript.title: Add script
addScript.body: Add the Aipify embed script to your site.

verify.title: Verify installation
verify.body: Run verification to confirm the connection.

developer.title: Developer settings
developer.subtitle: Install tokens, API keys, SDK access, and advanced diagnostics.
developer.advancedNotice: Advanced mode — standard users never need these settings.
developer.tokensHint: Tokens validate tenant, subscription, domain, and plan limits server-side. Shown only when rotated.
developer.rotated: New install token (copy now — it will not be shown again):
developer.apiKeysHint: Programmatic access for custom integrations (coming soon).
developer.sdkHint: Embedded SDK documentation and credentials (coming soon).
developer.diagnosticsHint: Heartbeat status, domain validation, and license checks.
developer.noInstallations: No installations yet. Start from Connect Aipify.
developer.tokenMasked: Token hidden · rotate to reveal a new token
